activities.name: Breakfast
activities.details: High-protein breakfast: eggs, avocado, whole grain toast
activities.prep_description: Cook breakfast
activities.skip_adjustment: Increase protein at lunch

activities.name: Lunch
activities.details: Balanced lunch: lean protein, complex carbs, vegetables
activities.prep_description: Prepare lunch or reheat meal prep
activities.skip_adjustment: Have a protein shake instead

activities.name: Dinner
activities.details: Light dinner: fish or chicken, salad, vegetables
activities.prep_description: Cook dinner
activities.skip_adjustment: Have a healthy takeout option

activities.name: Morning Multivitamin
activities.details: Take daily multivitamin with water
activities.skip_adjustment: Take double dose next day (if safe per physician)

activities.name: Omega-3 Fish Oil
activities.details: 2000mg EPA/DHA fish oil capsules
activities.skip_adjustment: Resume next day, do not double dose

activities.name: Vitamin D3
activities.details: 5000 IU Vitamin D3 with fat-containing meal
activities.skip_adjustment: Take with next meal that contains fat

activities.name: Pre-Workout Supplement
activities.details: Caffeine + beta-alanine blend, 30 min before workout
activities.prep_description: Mix with water
activities.skip_adjustment: Skip if no workout scheduled

activities.name: Magnesium Glycinate
activities.details: 400mg magnesium before bed for sleep quality
activities.skip_adjustment: Resume next evening

activities.name: Creatine Monohydrate
activities.details: 5g creatine monohydrate with water
activities.skip_adjustment: Take next day, maintain daily loading

activities.name: Metformin
activities.details: 500mg Metformin for glucose management
activities.skip_adjustment: CRITICAL: Contact physician if missed more than once

activities.name: Statin - Evening
activities.details: Atorvastatin 10mg for cholesterol management
activities.skip_adjustment: Take as soon as remembered, skip if almost time for next dose

activities.name: Zone 2 Run
activities.details: Maintain HR between 120-140 bpm, steady pace
activities.prep_description: Change into running gear, warm up
activities.skip_adjustment: Add 15 extra minutes to next cardio session

activities.name: HIIT Session
activities.details: High intensity intervals: 30s on / 30s off, 8-10 rounds
activities.prep_description: Set up equipment, dynamic warm-up
activities.skip_adjustment: Replace with 20-min bodyweight circuit next session

activities.name: Strength Training - Upper Body
activities.details: Focus on compound movements: bench press, rows, overhead press
activities.prep_description: Set up stations, warm up shoulders
activities.skip_adjustment: Double next upper body session volume

activities.name: Strength Training - Lower Body
activities.details: Squats, deadlifts, lunges, leg press
activities.prep_description: Foam roll legs, warm up hips
activities.skip_adjustment: Add extra set to next lower body session

activities.name: Yoga - Flexibility
activities.details: Vinyasa flow focusing on hip openers and hamstrings
activities.prep_description: Set up mat and blocks
activities.skip_adjustment: Add 10 min stretching to next workout

activities.name: Swimming Laps
activities.details: Freestyle laps, moderate intensity, focus on form
activities.prep_description: Pack swim bag, shower before pool
activities.skip_adjustment: Extend next swim by 15 minutes

activities.name: Morning Stretching
activities.details: Full body stretch routine, gentle hold positions
activities.skip_adjustment: No adjustment needed

activities.name: Eye Exercises
activities.details: 20-20-20 rule, palming, focus shifting exercises
activities.skip_adjustment: Do double session next time

activities.name: Cycling - Outdoor
activities.details: Moderate pace road cycling, maintain Zone 2 HR
activities.prep_description: Check bike, inflate tires, gear up
activities.skip_adjustment: Replace with indoor cycling or extra run

activities.name: Core Stability Workout
activities.details: Planks, dead bugs, bird dogs, anti-rotation exercises
activities.prep_description: Set up mat
activities.skip_adjustment: Add core work to next gym session

activities.name: Sauna Session
activities.details: Infrared sauna at 150°F, hydrate before and after
activities.prep_description: Hydrate, bring towels
activities.skip_adjustment: Do hot bath at home instead

activities.name: Ice Bath / Cold Plunge
activities.details: Cold immersion at 50°F for recovery
activities.prep_description: Warm up body first, prepare towels
activities.skip_adjustment: Cold shower at home for 3 minutes

activities.name: Sports Massage
activities.details: Deep tissue massage focusing on problem areas
activities.prep_description: Hydrate, avoid heavy meal beforehand
activities.skip_adjustment: Do self-massage with foam roller

activities.name: Red Light Therapy
activities.details: Full body red light exposure for recovery and skin health
activities.prep_description: Set up device
activities.skip_adjustment: No adjustment, resume next session

activities.name: Acupuncture Session
activities.details: Traditional acupuncture for pain management and stress
activities.prep_description: Eat light meal 1hr before, avoid caffeine
activities.skip_adjustment: Reschedule within 3 days if possible

activities.name: Guided Meditation
activities.details: Mindfulness meditation, body scan technique
activities.skip_adjustment: Do 5-min breathing exercise instead

activities.name: Breathwork Session
activities.details: Wim Hof method or box breathing protocol
activities.skip_adjustment: Do 5-min deep breathing instead

activities.name: Cardiologist Review
activities.details: Quarterly cardiovascular health review
activities.prep_description: Compile recent test results and symptom log
activities.skip_adjustment: Reschedule within 2 weeks, do not skip quarterly

activities.name: Nutritionist Check-in
activities.details: Review food diary, adjust macros as needed
activities.prep_description: Log meals for past week in app
activities.skip_adjustment: Send food diary via email for async review

activities.name: Physiotherapy Session
activities.details: Focus on mobility, injury prevention, and recovery
activities.prep_description: Note any new pain points or mobility issues
activities.skip_adjustment: Do prescribed home exercises and reschedule

activities.name: Mental Health Check-in
activities.details: CBT-based therapy session for stress management
activities.prep_description: Journal for 10 min about week's stressors
activities.skip_adjustment: Do guided meditation and journal

activities.name: Dermatologist Review
activities.details: Skin health check, review any new concerns
activities.prep_description: Take photos of any new skin changes
activities.skip_adjustment: Reschedule within 1 month

activities.name: Sleep Specialist Review
activities.details: Review sleep data, adjust sleep hygiene protocol
activities.prep_description: Export 2 weeks of sleep tracker data
activities.skip_adjustment: Send sleep data for async review

activities.name: Mid-Morning Snack
activities.details: Nuts, fruit, or protein bar
activities.skip_adjustment: No adjustment needed

activities.name: Afternoon Protein Shake
activities.details: Whey protein with almond milk, 30g protein
activities.prep_description: Blend shake
activities.skip_adjustment: Add extra protein to dinner

activities.name: Hydration Check
activities.details: Drink 500ml water, log hydration level
activities.skip_adjustment: Increase water intake at next check

activities.name: Weekly Meal Prep
activities.details: Prepare meals for the week: batch cook proteins and grains
activities.prep_description: Buy groceries, organize kitchen
activities.skip_adjustment: Order healthy meal delivery service
